characters.name: Baby Howie
characters.description: Duck from the past-1362184491  Baby Howie is basicly Howie but when he was younger. He has apperared in many episodes, including "Trash To The Past", "Banned!", "Imaginary Fiend" and "Home For The Howiedays". He is seen to be a crazier, cuter character and his apperance shows him as having large eyes too. In the episode "Imaginary Fiend", Baby Howie first meets Baby Octo and they becom best friends. In "Home For The Howieday", baby Howie and Baby Poodle are shown to get on well together, and it is likley that as they have grown older, Poodle has noticed the weird side of Howie.

characters.name: Batty
characters.description: BattyisPoodle's henchman. He is always having to do every thing for her. He is also is accident-prone. Batty loves Bubble gum but Poodle will not allow it. Batty is very helpful (even for Poodle). He loves dancing, chewing gum and eating gravy.

characters.name: Bunny
characters.description: Being friends withDuck,Octo,Howie,Sloth,Narwhal,Piggy Bunny is one of the main characters of the animated TV series,Almost Naked Animals. Bunny is feisty and narcissistic, as she cares more about beauty than everything else. She is also very short-tempered, as she yells at other characters, especiallyHowie. characters.name: Butterfly
characters.description: Butterfly - Episode 1 Butterflyis a minor character. She is an ordinary customer of the Banana Cabana and is seen going around the hotel. She can breathe fire. In Episode 1, she is called a "boring friend" and is not invited to Howie's party.

characters.name: Captain Fizzy
characters.description: Captain Fizzy“This is your captain speaking!”Gender:MaleSpecies:Sea TurtleEye color:BlackPersonal InformationAffiliations:Captain Fizzy’s Orange SodaFriends:His crewHowieSpouse(s)UnknownEnemies:General BubbaInterests:Making his soft drink.Production InformationFirst Appearance:The Duck Vinci Code(as a mention)Fizz Fuzz Bang(as a physical appearance) Captain Fizzyis the owner of the soft drink "Captain Fizzy's Fuzzy Orange Soda" and "Sugar" which is 99% sugar. He is a turtle. He started a few contests like the limited edition blue and green can contest and the Fuzzy Orange Happy Land contest. He has a floating factory which is a large boat.

characters.name: Chesley
characters.description: Chesley is a 1st grader who appeared inHowie's Little Helper. For his school project he had to spend a day following a person with a job and he chose hotel manager. He says pwease instead of please and managerwa instead of manager. He managed to stopNarwhalandDuck's fake party by saying that if they don't be quiet then there would be no TV for a week. He also knows how to calm angry animals. Chesley has some strange ideas like calling the gang by numbers instead of their names. He also made Piggy say poop after every 4 words. He also sent the Banana Cabana into space, which almost makes him evil. His underwear is similar to Duck's andPiggy's color of underwear.

characters.name: Cockroach
characters.description: Cockroachis a small animal, who appears is a few episodes. He is badly hurt, squashed, destroyed and injured in every episode he appears in. InIt's My Party, he falls off a table and lands. But he simply gets up after it. ThenDuckpicks him up and puts him on the trampoline, bouncing him around before he crashes through the floor. InKeep On Monster Truckin', he gets ran over by Howie's monster truck 4 times. InNothing But the Tooth, he gets crushed by a hippopotamus. InWho Inked the Bed, he gets crushed by a loudspeaker. He talkes like a hippie like 'dude' and 'man'. In Who Inked the Bed,Octomakes an inky of him andHowiedelcares, "C'mon, your doing inkies of someone we hardly know!" He also loves dancing and he dances instead of walking.
